'''bakudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherbed|featherbed]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherbed|featherbed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bakudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bækidith|bækidith]] || [[word:bækidij|bækidij]] || [[word:bækidish|bækidish]] || [[word:bækidi|bækidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bakukuduth|bakukuduth]] || [[word:bakukuduj|bakukuduj]] || [[word:bakukudush|bakukudush]] || [[word:bakukudu|bakukudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bakuduth|bakuduth]] || [[word:bakuduj|bakuduj]] || [[word:bakudush|bakudush]] || [[word:bakudu|bakudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bakufduth|bakufduth]] || [[word:bakufduj|bakufduj]] || [[word:bakufdush|bakufdush]] || [[word:bakufduf|bakufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bakuduthu|bakuduthu]] || [[word:bakuduju|bakuduju]] || [[word:bakudushu|bakudushu]] || [[word:bakuduku|bakuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bakuduth|bakuduth]] || [[word:bakuduj|bakuduj]] || [[word:bakudush|bakudush]] || [[word:bakudu|bakudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bakuduthul|bakuduthul]] || [[word:bakudujul|bakudujul]] || [[word:bakudushul|bakudushul]] || [[word:bakudukul|bakudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bakuduthuthu|bakuduthuthu]] || [[word:bakudujuju|bakudujuju]] || [[word:bakudushushu|bakudushushu]] || [[word:bakuduku|bakuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bakuduthun|bakuduthun]] || [[word:bakudujun|bakudujun]] || [[word:bakudushun|bakudushun]] || [[word:bakudukun|bakudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bakuduthuoro|bakuduthuoro]] || [[word:bakudujuoro|bakudujuoro]] || [[word:bakudushuoro|bakudushuoro]] || [[word:bakudukuoro|bakudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
